prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Island). State whether it applies to England and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document details a grant determination for local authorities specifically in England, aimed at funding adult social care projects. The Minister of State for Social Care is acting under legislation applicable to England, indicating that the provisions and support outlined apply solely to local authorities within England.
